import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None
def test_get_factors_prime_number():
    """Test that prime numbers return themselves as a single factor."""
    # Test with prime number 7 - should return [7]
    result = source.get_factors(7)
    # The buggy code returns [] for primes, fixed code should return [7]
    assert result == [7], f"Expected [7] for prime input, got {result}"
    
    # Also test with another prime number to be thorough
    result2 = source.get_factors(13)
    assert result2 == [13], f"Expected [13] for prime input, got {result2}"
